qa_pair.question: Create a new graph. Add a Domain entity with value "example.com". Run the transform that creates a Website entity from a domain on it. Then add an Email Address entity "bob@example.com" and run the transform that extracts a domain from an email address on that email. After all of this, how many entities are on the graph? Answer with a single integer.
Without running anything, determine how many of the server's built-in transforms can accept a Maltego Domain entity as their input. Answer with a single integer.
What is the Maltego main property name used for the IPv4 Address entity type in this server's entity catalog? Answer with the exact property name only.

Create a graph and add a URL entity with the value "https://www.example.com:8443/path?x=1". Run the transform that extracts a domain from a URL on it. What is the value of the resulting Domain entity? Answer with the value only.

Create a graph and add an Email Address entity with the value "Alice@SUB.Example.COM". Run the transform that extracts the domain from an email address on it. What is the value of the Domain entity that is produced? Answer with the value only.

Create a graph. Add a Domain entity "a.com" and an IPv4 Address entity "1.1.1.1", then add a link from the domain to the IP labeled "resolves to". Now delete the Domain entity. After the deletion, how many links remain on the graph? Answer with a single integer.
Which provider owns the transform that performs a reverse DNS (PTR) lookup turning an IPv4 address into a DNS name? Answer with the provider name only.
Using the entity-type catalog, how many entity types belong to the "infrastructure" category? Answer with a single integer.

Create a graph and add a Domain entity "dup.com". Add a Domain entity with the value "dup.com" again using the default settings. How many entities are on the graph afterwards? Answer with a single integer.

Create a graph and add an Email Address entity with the value "no-at-symbol-here". Run the transform that extracts a domain from an email address on it. Respond with exactly Yes or No: did the transform add any new entity to the graph?

Run the "Email Investigation" machine on the seed value "joe@corp.com" with network access disabled (offline / passive parse-only). After it finishes, how many entities are on the graph? Answer with a single integer.
How many investigation machines (reusable workflow templates) does the server provide? Answer with a single integer.
Counting every transform the server knows about (regardless of whether an API key is configured), how many transforms accept a Maltego IPv4 Address entity as input? Answer with a single integer.
Excluding the built-in "local" provider, how many external OSINT providers does the server expose? Answer with a single integer.
Which provider does the server use the environment variable HIBP_API_KEY for? Answer with the provider's short name (id) only.
How many automatic graph layout algorithms does the server support? Answer with a single integer.

Create a graph and import the following CSV (header included): "type,value" then rows "Domain,a.com", "Email,x@a.com", "IPv4Address,2.2.2.2", and "Bogus,zz". How many rows are skipped because their type is unknown? Answer with a single integer.

Create a graph and import this CSV with a header "type,value,link_to" and rows: "Domain,hub.com," then "IPv4Address,5.5.5.5,hub.com" then "Email,a@hub.com,hub.com". Then identify the interesting pivot entities. What is the value of the single top-ranked pivot entity? Answer with the value only.

Run the Email Investigation machine on "bob@example.com" with network access disabled. Then list the investigation steps recorded in Investigation Memory. How many steps were recorded? Answer with a single integer.

Run the Email Investigation machine on "bob@example.com" with network disabled. A Domain entity for example.com is created. Using the investigation memory, which transform discovered that Domain entity? Answer with the transform name only.
Create a graph and add a Domain entity "seed.com" manually (not via any transform). Then compute its intelligence-quality scores. What is its source_reliability score? Answer with the number only.
Using the unified query detector, when the query "https://shop.example.com/cart" is investigated, what entity value is used as the seed (the host extracted from the URL)? Answer with the value only.

Run the Email Investigation machine on "bob@example.com" with network disabled, then ask the Next Best Action engine for recommendations. Respond with exactly Yes or No: does it recommend running "parse.email_to_domain" again on the original email entity?

Run the Email Investigation machine on "bob@example.com" offline. The resulting Domain entity example.com was discovered only by the built-in local provider. What is its confidence score? Answer with the number only.

Create a graph and import this CSV (header "type,value,link_to") with rows "Domain,a.com," and "IPv4Address,1.2.3.4,a.com". Export the graph to CSV, then import that exported CSV into a brand-new graph. How many links does the new graph have? Answer with a single integer.
Create a graph, add a Domain "a.com" and an IPv4 Address "1.1.1.1", and add one link between them. Then delete that link. How many links remain on the graph? Answer with a single integer.
With no Censys credentials configured in the environment, is the Censys transform "censys.ip_to_services" available to run? Respond with exactly Yes or No.
In the server's entity-type catalog, what is the main property field name used for the Maltego Website entity type? Answer with the field name only.
In the server's entity-type catalog, what is the main property field name used for the Maltego Company entity type? Answer with the field name only.
